normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 3.1 - Residential Development
scope_summary: Amends or replaces the deemed-to-comply provisions of R-Codes Volume 1 clauses 5.1.2, 5.1.3, 5.2.1, 5.2.2, 5.2.4, 5.2.5 and 5.4.3 for all residential development covered by R-Codes Volume 1 within the City of Melville, unless LPS6, an activity centre plan or another policy specifies otherwise. Covers street setbacks, garage and carport setbacks, fences and street walls, garage width, sight lines, boundary walls and outbuildings. Proposals not meeting the amended deemed-to-comply provisions require performance assessment against the relevant R-Codes design principles.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: buildings encroaching the primary street setback, compensated by equal open space

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: eaves and architectural features

quality_flags: Referenced figures (Figure 2a/2c/2e, 8a/8b, 11, 12) and R-Codes Tables 1/2a are not reproduced in the text extraction
References section lists 'LPP1.1 Planning Process and Decision Making' and also 'LPP1.1 Amenity' - the latter appears to be a source-document numbering error (Amenity is LPP 1.10)
Page footer lines interleaved throughout extracted text
